{"code":"# Get all merged pull requests from all repositories
merged_prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="merged")

# Filter for PRs that close Linear issues
prs_with_linear = [pr for pr in merged_prs if pr.closes_linear]

# Show count and first few for inspection
len(merged_prs), len(prs_with_linear), prs_with_linear[:3] if prs_with_linear else []"}
